hero.headline: Fast {{service}} across {{location}}
hero.subline: Gas Safe local engineers for no-heat, no-hot-water, recurring fault codes, and domestic power flushing support.

heroImage.alt: Smiling engineer carrying out a home boiler fault diagnosis

pricing.pricingDisclaimer: Repair costs depend on fault complexity and replacement part availability.

financeExample.summary: Finance available over 3, 5, 8, and 10 years. Interest rates are discussed at quote appointment.

faults.title: No heat
faults.description: Heating stops during cold spells and rooms stay cold.

faults.title: No hot water
faults.description: Boiler fires but taps are running lukewarm.

faults.title: Leak
faults.description: Pipework or pressure valve leaking around the boiler.

faults.title: Low pressure
faults.description: Gauge drops below 1 bar and boiler shuts off.

faults.title: Kettling
faults.description: Loud boiling-like sounds from scale build-up.

faults.title: Error codes
faults.description: Persistent display errors stopping normal heating.

proofCards.reviewSnippet: Engineer identified circulation issue quickly and solved it.
Excellent communication and a clear quote before work.
Came prepared with the right replacement part.

faqs.question: Do you cover Hayes evenings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Emergency boiler repair slots are available evenings and weekends.

faqs.question: Can you repair older boilers?
faqs.answer: We can diagnose older systems and advise on repair viability versus replacement.

seo.title: Boiler Repair in Hayes | Empire Home Solutions
seo.description: Local boiler repair in Hayes with same-day callouts, fixed diagnostics, and trusted Gas Safe engineers.
